name: @gjsify/integration-socket.io
description: Integration tests: socket.io on GJS and Node. Ports a curated subset of refs/socket.io/packages/socket.io/test/ to validate @gjsify/* implementations.

scripts.build:test:gjs: gjsify build src/test.mts --app gjs --globals auto,WebSocket --outfile dist/test.gjs.mjs
scripts.build:test: gjsify run build:test:node && gjsify run build:test:gjs
scripts.test: gjsify run build:test && gjsify run test:node && gjsify run test:gjs

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
